content.en:
Half an hour later.

Ye Tian finally completed the transformation of the time talent and successfully raised the time talent to a higher level.

【Time Talent: God-level】

Looking at the time talent that had become a god-level, Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

At this time, Ye Tian's twelve full attributes were all god-level, which meant that he could cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the seventh layer of the highest realm.

Otherwise, a lifetime can only be confined to the sixth level of perfection.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's physical body began to change, and wisps of chaotic laws began to merge with Ye Tian's physical body, transforming his physical body.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian thought of a possibility.

At this point, his body should be transforming towards the Chaos Saint.

Once all the twelve attributes become god-level, the body will become a Chaos Holy Body, and Ye Tian's time talent has not become a god-level before, so it has never become a Chaos Holy Body.

Now, Ye Tian's time talent has finally been upgraded to the god level, and it is enough to transform.

Once Ye Tian becomes a Chaos Holy Body, coupled with the Immortal Physique, it is equivalent to becoming a Chaos Immortal Body, and among the many physiques in the universe, it definitely belongs to the most rebellious category.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's body was also rapidly transforming.

Ten days later, Ye Tian's body transformation was completed.

At this time, he truly became a chaotic immortal, and every cell contained the breath of the law of chaos.

And because he had become a Chaos Immortal, Ye Tian's physical strength had also increased a little, and his strength had improved a little.

In the following time, Ye Tian focused on the magical power of the spear of time.

The time talent has been upgraded to the god level, and Ye Tian can completely comprehend the time spear to the consummation realm, but it is very difficult to comprehend a time divine power to the consummation realm.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian took out a piece of crystal, and this crystal was the time artifact that Ye Tian had obtained.

This time artifact had some effect on the mysteries of contemplation, but the effect was not very great, so Ye Tian didn't make much use of this time artifact to improve the level of the mysteries.

But it doesn't mean that this time artifact is not very useful, this time artifact is very mysterious, and it can make a race have a talent for time, which is awesome.

Ye Tian had checked many secrets and knew the content of time wonders, but there was no time wonder that could produce time talent from all races, at least there was no mention of this in those time knowledge.

So, this time wonder is not simple!

In the past, Ye Tian had checked this time wonder many times, but he didn't gain much.

This time, Ye Tian once again held this time artifact, trying to use it to comprehend the magic power of the time spear.

Ye Tian held this time wonder in both hands and silently began to comprehend.

With the dual assistance of the time wonder and this time secret realm, Ye Tian's comprehension speed on the time spear was very fast.

Suddenly.

A strong fluctuation poured into Ye Tian's perception, and Ye Tian's perception followed this fluctuation and suddenly came to a void.

Rumble!!!!!

A strong source of the law of time emerged, appearing in Ye Tian's perception.

"At this time......"

Ye Tian came back to his senses in an instant, opened his eyes, and looked at the time wonder in his hand.

He understood that just now he was attracted by the fluctuations of the time strange thing and entered the internal void of the time strange thing, and sensed the existence of the origin of the law of time.

"Sure enough, this time wonder is not simple. The reason why I couldn't feel the special nature of time strange things before was because my time talent level was not high. Now, my time talent has been upgraded to the god level, so I have sensed the extraordinaryness of time wonders!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian used his god-level time talent to mobilize the power of time and extend into this time wonder.

Soon, Ye Tian sensed the existence of the origin of the law of time again.

"Time Origin Artifact? No, it should be a half-finished Time Origin Artifact!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

In the universe, some strange objects can evolve into origin artifacts in the evolution of a long time, but this process is very long, and the success rate is too low.

Therefore, there is no way for normal strange things to evolve into origin gods.

But once the origin of the law is born in a strange object, it will gradually move towards the essence of the origin artifact, and such a strange object is called a half-finished origin artifact.

It's just that the semi-finished origin artifact is too rare, and Ye Tian couldn't find out about this time strange thing before.

"I didn't expect this time artifact to be a semi-finished time origin artifact, and its value is far beyond that of time artifact!"

Ye Tian was very excited, this was undoubtedly an unexpected surprise.

He can now completely absorb the origin of the law of time in the time artifact, which is enough to raise the magic power of the time spear to the consummation realm in a short period of time.

But in this case, this half-finished time origin artifact will be wasted.

Thinking about it, Ye Tian still decided to continue to use it, and if this time artifact continued to be conceived, maybe find some way to speed up its gestation, maybe this time artifact could become a time origin artifact in the future.

In the following days, Ye Tian used this half-finished time origin artifact and the effect of the time secret realm to comprehend the spear of time.

Occasionally, he also practiced some time in the exercise of strength.

In this way, Ye Tian cultivated in the Time Secret Realm for a whole year.

this day.

Ye Tian was taken out of the Time Secret Realm by the Lord of Cangyu, and at this time, he also successfully cultivated the magic power of the Time Spear to the Dacheng Realm, which was also his current limit.

If he wants to cultivate the Time Spear to the Consummation Realm, it will take a long time, and perhaps if he encounters other great opportunities that are conducive to the cultivation of the Time Spear, then he can cultivate the Time Spear to the Consummation Realm in a short period of time.

The time spear of the Dacheng realm is also very powerful, it can cut the enemy's lifespan for 2,600 years, and it can be cast eight times in one day.

For Ye Tian, the time spear of the Dacheng realm was enough.

Cangyu is out of bounds.

Ye Tian had just been brought out by the Lord of Cangyu, and the Kunwu Supreme appeared.

Kunwu Supreme stared at Ye Tian with his eyes, and when he saw that Ye Tian had turned into a Chaos Holy Body, he was immediately surprised.

"Lord Cangyu, it seems that your guidance is very useful, you have really succeeded in helping Ye Tian raise his time talent to the god level, thank you!" Kun Wu Supreme thanked him.

At this time, the Lord of Cangyu was quite embarrassed, in fact, he felt that Ye Tian had no hope of raising the Mystery Level Time Talent to the God Level, because this process was too difficult and too difficult!

He was able to do this because there was a great opportunity and it could not be replicated.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would actually raise his time talent to the god level in the Time Secret Realm, which was completely beyond his expectations.

"Kunwu Supreme, Ye Tian's talent is very rebellious, and it is the result of his own efforts. "

The Lord of the Blue Feather said lightly.

The two didn't talk for long, and the Kunwu Supreme took Ye Tian away.

Return to the Terran Temple.

The Kunwu Supreme mentioned to Ye Tian the question of the Terran Evolution Immortal Race's pilot.

"Ye Tian, the plan of the human race to evolve the immortal race has begun, and it has been officially carried out in some trials, but it is just very hidden. The plan for the transformation of the Earth Humans into the Immortals will be carried out by you, and at that time, we will completely close the area around the Earth, and the Earth will not be open to the public until the first step of the plan is completed, so as not to make mistakes. This time, it's up to you to go to Earth to carry out the plan. Kunwu Supreme said.

"Okay, when are you going?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You can go at any time, your mission time is 100 years, and within 100 years, it is best to transform all the human beings on the entire earth into immortals, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

His trial is just a small pilot, the task is not very difficult, in a hundred years, many ordinary people have died, and after the cultivator has transformed the immortal clan, the descendants born later are all immortal clans.

As long as 100 years of experimentation, all human beings on the earth can definitely become immortals.

Ye Tian used his points to buy some resources in the Terran Supreme Palace, and then left the Terran Supreme Palace.

This time, the Lord of Darkness and the ten cosmic gods went with him.

Due to the presence of the Lord as a guard, Ye Tian did not need to go through the teleportation stone gate, and directly let the spaceship of the Dark Lord carry Ye Tian and the other cosmic gods to the Disk Milky Way.

A few days later, the disk galaxy arrived.

......

Earth.

The Moon Emperor was practicing, when suddenly a voice came.

"Yue'er, I'm back!"

The Moon Emperor opened his eyes and flew out, only to see a figure in the distance instantly appear in front of her, it was Ye Tian.

"Husband!"

The Moon Emperor was pleasantly surprised.

The two hugged on the spot.

Then, the Moon Emperor found the eleven guards behind Ye Tian.

She didn't know that these people were the gods and masters of the universe, otherwise she would have been shocked.

"Go back first!"

Ye Tian took the Moon Emperor's hand and returned to the Heavenly Pavilion, while the Dark Lord was hiding in the depths of the void and did not follow Ye Tian.

They only need to ensure that the earth is not disturbed, and Ye Tian's safety is not a problem.

In the Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian told the Moon Emperor about the matter of the Immortal Clan, and after the Moon Emperor heard it, he was immediately extremely surprised.

"Husband, many Earth humans have traveled to other regions of the galaxy, do you want to call them back?"

The Moon Emperor asked.

"Well, all the human beings on the earth, who can be contacted, all of them are called back, if they can't be called back, then there is no way to catch up with this pilot, and they can only wait for the full promotion later. Ye Tian said.

"Okay, then I'll arrange to go down and gather all the earth disciples from all branches of the Heavenly Pavilion back!"

Moon Emperor said.

In the days that followed, the humans of Earth in various parts of the galaxy were notified to return to Earth at all costs and abandon all their roots in the outside world.

Most of the Earthlings have returned, but some Earthlings don't want to go back to that little part of the Earth and ignore the notices.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.
